name: Il Centro Community Center
description: Il Centro Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brooklyn, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: McCarren Play Center
description: McCarren Play Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brooklyn, NY. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Sunset Park Recreation Center
description: Sunset Park Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brooklyn, NY. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.
